from source import process_batch


def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    """Test that all items including the last one are processed."""
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Output should include all items. Input length: {len(items)}, output length: {len(result)}"
    assert result == [2, 4, 6], f"Each item should be doubled. Expected [2, 4, 6], got {result}"
